title: Ocean's Delight
description: Ocean's Delight is an addon mod for Farmer's Delight based around adding culinary content to the ocean!
body:
📖 About:
Ocean's Delight is an addon mod for Farmer's Delight based around adding culinary content to the ocean!  


Using your culinary skills, you can prepare a myriad of hearty meals made with creatures of the ocean!

This Addon Mod for Farmer's Delight focuses on giving more content to the Ocean to satisfy our desire to eat those creatures from the depths!!!

 

 

🔨 Required Dependencies:
Farmer's Delight
